settings.title: Premium electric mobility at a price that makes sense.
settings.subtitle: MaxFoot was founded in 2019 with one belief: U.S. riders shouldn't have to choose between overpriced premium electric trikes and unsafe, low-quality alternatives. We build the balance.

settings.headline: Built around what riders actually need.
settings.lead_text: Every decision we make starts with four commitments. Affordable pricing means no markup between the factory and your door. Dependable quality means components that last, not components that look good in ads. Real-world usability means trikes designed for grocery runs, family outings, and daily commutes, not for showroom floors. Continuous innovation means we keep listening to riders and keep improving what we ship next.

settings.title: We stepped in to balance affordability, safety, and everyday practicality.
settings.lead_text: Founded in 2019, MaxFoot was created after recognizing a gap in the U.S. market: riders had to choose between overpriced premium electric trikes or unsafe, low-quality alternatives.
settings.body_text: We stepped in to balance the two, and we are committed to creating the best electric tricycles for adults, designed for the way Americans actually ride.

settings.title: Built for every kind of rider.
settings.lead_text: Our products are designed for seniors, families, commuters, and leisure riders, helping solve the everyday challenges that keep people from riding more.

settings.headline: We build for the pure joy of riding.
settings.lead_text: We didn't just want to engineer the best electric tricycle for adults; we wanted to bring back the pure joy of riding. Whether you're upgrading your daily commute or looking for the perfect electric tricycle for 2 adults to share with a loved one, we build every vehicle with your safety and freedom in mind.
settings.body_text: We believe thoughtful product development is what makes safer and more accessible mobility possible for more people.
settings.pull_quote: Built for your safety. Built for your freedom. Built for the people you ride with.

settings.headline: High-quality electric mobility at a price that makes sense.
settings.lead_text: Our mission is to provide more U.S. riders with high-quality electric mobility solutions at a price that makes sense.

settings.heading: Built For Quality & Safety.
settings.subheading: Every detail engineered to elevate your ride comfort and ensure maximum safety.

settings.title: Aluminum Frame
settings.text: Rugged, durable, and built to last. Engineered to handle real-world loads, day after day.

settings.title: 750W Rear Motor
settings.text: Peak power 1100W with a powerful 85 N.m torque. Slip-free performance on hills, gravel, and city streets.

settings.title: Samsung Battery
settings.text: UL-certified 48V 20Ah for up to 85 miles of range on a single charge.

settings.title: Rear Dual Disc Brake
settings.text: Prevent rollover and protect riding safety. Confident stopping power in any condition.

settings.title: Rear Differential
settings.text: Enhanced stability and safer cornering. Available on select models.

settings.title: Multifunctional Tail Light
settings.text: Prompt turn signaling to alert trailing vehicles and ensure safety on every ride.

settings.title: UL-certified, tested beyond the standard.
settings.lead_text: We place strong emphasis on safety and compliance, and UL certification is an important part of our commitment to quality and rider confidence.
settings.body_text: This means that our UL-certified Samsung battery has passed extremely rigorous tests for overcharging, short circuits, crushing, high temperatures, and even needle penetration. We don't ship batteries we wouldn't ride ourselves.

settings.heading: Brand Evolution.
settings.subheading: From a single model to a full lineup of U.S.-focused electric trikes, in six years.

settings.title: First Model Launch
settings.text: We officially launched our brand and introduced our first two wheel drive electric bike. This marked the beginning of our journey in electric mobility and laid the foundation for our continued growth.

settings.title: First Electric Tricycle
settings.text: Recognizing growing demand for stability and everyday practicality, we launched our first electric tricycle for adults and expanded our product direction.

settings.title: Monocoque Model Expansion
settings.text: As R&D capabilities grew, we launched our 20-inch and 24-inch fat tire monocoque electric trikes for adults, improving frame structure, stability, and ride quality.

settings.title: Two-Seater Tricycle
settings.text: Engineered as a reliable electric tricycle for 2 adults, this model expands our lineup, making our trikes perfect for personal transportation and shared family rides.

settings.title: Electric Motorcycle Development
settings.text: The next addition to our lineup, premium electric motorcycles for sale, is coming soon. Stay tuned.

settings.title: Ready to Ride?
settings.subtitle: 14-day free trial. Free shipping. 2-year warranty. Nothing to lose.

settings.text: New models, exclusive offers, and riding tips — straight to your inbox.
